response.justification: Over 15 years of full-stack engineering with deep TypeScript and Node.js production experience across multiple companies, active AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP frameworks) at the current role directly matching a stated requirement, and a demonstrated testing culture spanning library authorship, TDD advocacy, and workshops. The primary gaps are the absence of Nest.js and Kotlin, which are both listed in the stack, and no explicit Vitest or Playwright callout — though the underlying competencies are clearly present.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js fullstack experience across multiple high-throughput production environments
Current hands-on AI agent and MCP framework work directly matching the role's AI agent development requirement
Strong testing culture: authored testing libraries, ran TDD workshops, and applied TDD and CI/CD practices consistently across roles
concerns: Nest.js not mentioned anywhere despite being the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin absent from listed skills even though it is the named secondary backend language
No explicit reference to Vitest or Playwright, the specified testing tools
